zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Gresham於大約1520年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，她的父親William Gresham38歲，母親Mary Bodley31歲。她於1543年4月24日與John Marshe在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 瑪麗 勒 包福 安德 聖 潘可拉斯 索 萊恩 煙雨 哥吉拉 哈洛福斯 宏尼 萊恩結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1578年5月29日在英國英格蘭享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Gresham于大约1520年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，她的父亲William Gresham38岁，母亲Mary Bodley31岁。她于1543年4月24日与John Marshe在英国英格兰倫敦聖 瑪麗 勒 包福 安德 聖 潘可拉斯 索 萊恩 煙雨 哥吉拉 哈洛福斯 宏尼 萊恩结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1578年5月29日在英国英格兰享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Gresham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): habitational name from a place in Norfolk, so named from Old English græs, gærs ‘grass(land), pasturage’ + hām ‘homestead’ or hamm ‘enclosure hemmed in by water’.

variants.name: Grisham
meanings: English: variant of   Gresham  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Gresham was born about 1520, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Gresham, was 38 and her mother, Mary Bodley, was 31. She married John Marshe on 24 April 1543, in St Mary le Bow and St Pancras Soper Lane with All Hallows Honey Lane, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 29 May 1578, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Gresham est née environ 1520, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Gresham, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mary Bodley, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé John Marshe le 24 avril 1543, à St Mary le Bow and St Pancras Soper Lane with All Hallows Honey Lane, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 mai 1578, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Gresham um 1520 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Gresham 38 und ihre Mutter Mary Bodley 31. Sie hat am 24. April 1543 in St Mary le Bow and St Pancras Soper Lane with All Hallows Honey Lane, London, England, United Kingdom John Marshe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. Mai 1578 im Alter von 59 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Gresham è nata il circa 1520 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Gresham, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Mary Bodley, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato John Marshe il 24 aprile 1543, nel St Mary le Bow and St Pancras Soper Lane with All Hallows Honey Lane, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 29 maggio 1578, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Gresham(이)가 대략 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Gresham(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Bodley(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1543년 4월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 메리 일 보 앤드 스트 파크라스 소퍼 랜 위스 앨 핼로스 호니 랜에서 John Marshe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1578년 5월 29일 영국 잉글랜드에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Gresham nasceu aproximadamente 1520, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Gresham, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mary Bodley, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com John Marshe em 24 de abril de 1543, em St Mary le Bow and St Pancras Soper Lane with All Hallows Honey Lane, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de maio de 1578, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Gresham родилась около 1520 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Gresham было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Bodley, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Marshe 24 апреля 1543 г. в местности ст мэри л боу анд ст панкрас сопир лан вит алл холлоус хоуни лан, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 29 мая 1578 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Gresham nació aproximadamente 1520, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Gresham, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Mary Bodley, tenía 31 años. Se casó con John Marshe el 24 de abril de 1543, en St Mary le Bow and St Pancras Soper Lane with All Hallows Honey Lane, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de mayo de 1578, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
